description: Objective dataset-protocol GO/NO-GO criteria evaluated after feasibility pass and before primary label collection. No outcome-based tuning permitted.

phase_0_protocol_audit.timing: Before any dataset row is executed

checks.criterion: OSF preregistration timestamp precedes any execution log
split_rule.yaml, corpus_filters.yaml, benchmark_inventory.csv hashes recorded in split_manifest
HF dataset revisions pinned in writing for TACO and CodeContests+ Verified

phase_1_feasibility_pilot.timing: After split manifest generation on full eligible pool; before LLM mass generation

phase_2_pre_collection_gate.timing: After feasibility; before primary label collection at scale
phase_2_pre_collection_gate.description: GO/NO-GO decision for full data collection

phase_3_post_collection_integrity.timing: After collection; before primary statistical analysis
phase_3_post_collection_integrity.description: Integrity checks only; does not permit corpus changes

criteria.name: minimum_eligible_problems_primary
criteria.rationale: Preregistration target 1200 with allowance for mechanical exclusions

criteria.name: minimum_eligible_problems_holdout
criteria.rationale: Preregistration target 800 with allowance for dedup and Verified filter

criteria.name: maximum_problem_exclusion_rate
criteria.rationale: If >35% excluded, protocol too lossy for generalizable LPR claims

criteria.name: minimum_hidden_test_coverage
criteria.rationale: 80/20 split on N>=100 implies withheld>=80 at floor

criteria.name: sandbox_success_rate_feasibility
criteria.rationale: At least 85% bundled reference/canonical solutions pass public suite in pilot

criteria.name: latent_incorrectness_observable_feasibility
criteria.rationale: At least 2% of reference solutions public-pass but withheld-fail in pilot, OR >=5 problems show latent failures among references

criteria.name: cross_corpus_dedup_bounded
criteria.rationale: Excessive overlap reduces independence of holdout

criteria.name: excessive_exclusion
criteria.condition: excluded_problems / candidate_problems > 0.50 for any corpus role

criteria.name: license_blocker
criteria.condition: legal review flags redistribution or ShareAlike conflict for chosen primary/holdout pair

criteria.name: split_manifest_missing
criteria.condition: cannot reproduce identical public/withheld indices from frozen rule on re-run

criteria.name: sandbox_unreproducible
criteria.condition: infrastructure_error_rate > 0.10 on reference runs in pilot

stop_criteria.description: Integrity failure; halt collection and do not publish confirmatory dataset claims

criteria.condition: split_rule or corpus_filters modified after feasibility without new OSF version
holdout labels inspected before split manifest locked
problems added or removed based on latent incorrectness prevalence
TPR/TNR Verified threshold lowered after pilot

decision_matrix.GO: All G1-G10 satisfied AND no N1-N8 triggered AND no S1-S4 triggered
decision_matrix.NO_GO: Any N1-N8 triggered OR any required G criterion failed (may revise protocol via new OSF version only)

criteria.name: minimum_public_pass_programs_holdout
criteria.note: If not met, study underpowered; report honestly; do not add models post hoc

criteria.name: minimum_latent_prevalence_holdout
criteria.note: Ceiling effect warning if below 1%; does not trigger corpus change

explicitly_forbidden_responses_to_no_go: Switching holdout to APPS or HumanEval without new preregistration
Dropping Verified TPR/TNR filter on CodeContests+
Selecting problems with highest reference latent-fail rate
